summary: This document is an internal sales list of UK NHS tender notices and market engagement opportunities relevant to health technology providers. It details specific projects such as AI triage services, dementia support, and hospital discharge assistance, including contact emails and submission deadlines. Internal notes are interspersed, evaluating the validity of certain opportunities for the startup.
path_to_original: /Users/eduardolizana/Documents/6. Companies /1. Companies with Rodrigo/KeepMeCompany/4. Sales/2. Tenders/Tender - UK List.docx
sniff_test_notes: Contains internal annotation in Spanish evaluating opportunity validity ('no es valido prq es un training'). Includes specific NHS staff email addresses.
